title: Phool Bane Angaare
writer: Rajinder Singh Bedi, Prayag Raj, Saghir Usmani
actors: Mala Sinha, Raaj Kumar, Ashish Kumar
plot: Based in Santa Cruz, Bombay, Usha undertakes to look after her family consisting of her widowed mother and younger brother, Ashish, and even decides to not marry her army officer sweetheart, Captain Rajesh, so that she can look af...
